falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above 5,200 (previous 52-week high) by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key resistance would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the bottom pattern similarity

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX Volatility Index drops below 15 (current level: 22) and remains there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained ultra-low volatility would contradict the 'BLOWOFF SCORE' of 39, which implies imminent volatility, directly falsifying the pattern's predictive validity

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 0.5% rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major policy shift contradicting the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern's implied economic environment would invalidate the UNKNOWN verdict by introducing a clear external catalyst

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
